subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art my Lord and my God, my Master and my Support! Upon Thee do I rely and in Thee do I place my trust. To the cord of Thy bounty do I cling
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و سندی علیک اعتمادی و اتکالی و بحبل فضلک تشبثی و بباب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for strength, @prayer for spiritual recognition
